name: ref-premium-design-build
description: Reference clone of Cinco Mosqueteros (cincomosqueteros.co) adapted to ProofPilot's premium-design-build preset — the exemplar for $50K+ hardscape/outdoor-living design-build firms. Modern sans + italic serif accent, black/cream/muted-gold palette, commissioned architectural or aerial photography, portfolio-first case-study rhythm. DNA-only; swap brand to personalize.
